visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman with long dark hair standing in front of white cabinets. She is wearing a black tank top with a colorful dotted pattern at the bottom. She speaks directly to the camera with a friendly expression. White subtitles and a logo appear at the top. (2) The scene shifts to the woman sitting at a white desk with a large mirror. She is preparing her skin by applying cotton pads soaked in toner to her cheeks. She holds a small white tube of lip balm and applies it to her lips. She then uses a pink handled razor to trim her eyebrows, looking closely into the mirror. (3) She transitions to applying base makeup. She uses a brush to apply a purple-tinted primer from a palette held in her hand. She then uses a small pink sponge to blend the product into her skin. The room is brightly lit with soft indoor lighting, showing a home studio setup. (4) The woman focuses on her eyes, using various brushes to apply pink and brown eyeshadows from a multi-colored palette. She applies eyeliner with a fine-tipped pen and mascara to her upper lashes. She uses a light-colored pencil to highlight her lower eyelid (aegyo-sal). (5) Moving to the rest of her face, she applies liquid foundation with a brush, then uses a large purple-handled brush to sweep orange blush onto her cheeks. She uses a dual-ended contour stick to define her nose and jawline, blending it with her fingers. (6) In the final steps, she applies loose powder using a large puff and then applies pink lipstick with a lip brush. She finishes by spraying a setting mist from a pink bottle over her face. She smiles and poses, showing the completed look. (7) The video concludes with a quick montage of her outdoors. She is seen sitting in a car wearing a white and yellow polka-dot shirt, lounging with a blue coffee cup, and standing by a brick wall in a schoolgirl-style outfit with a plaid skirt.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我之前化妝. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Variety]: 可以看這支! 五分鐘完妝. [Subtitle]: 都是五分鐘. (3) [Subtitle]: 事隔半年後... 我現在化妝要50分鐘. (4) [Slogan]: STEP 1 濕敷. [Variety]: 臉部補足水分使之後好上妝. (5) [Slogan]: STEP 2 厚敷護唇. [Variety]: 加強修護保濕軟化死皮. (6) [Slogan]: STEP 3 修眉. (7) [Variety]: 等待濕敷的時間 先準備好要用的工具. (8) [Variety]: 小撇步. [Subtitle]: 你弄的差不多慢慢弄好的時候. (9) [Slogan]: STEP 4 毛孔隱形術. [Variety]: 填補臉部凹凸不平、凹洞. (10) [Slogan]: STEP 5 紫色校色妝前乳. [Variety]: 校正臉部黃暗沈的皮膚. (11) [Slogan]: STEP 6 遮瑕. (12) [Slogan]: STEP 7 眼影打底色. [Variety]: 為後續顏色打底也讓眼部更精緻. (13) [Slogan]: STEP 8 眼影中間色. [Variety]: 眼皮中間往兩眼尾方向暈染 產生自然的漸層感. (14) [Slogan]: STEP 9 眼影深邃色. [Variety]: 眼皮眼窩區域讓眼部輪廓更深邃. (15) [Slogan]: STEP 10 眉毛補色. (16) [Slogan]: STEP 11 眉毛輪廓. [Variety]: 加強眉型延伸開立體感. (17) [Slogan]: STEP 12 眉刷子. [Variety]: 梳理眉毛均勻色彩. (18) [Slogan]: STEP 13 染眉膏. [Variety]: 搭配妝容髮色更提升整體立體感. (19) [Slogan]: STEP 14 眼線. [Variety]: 放大眼睛加深輪廓. (20) [Slogan]: STEP 15 睫毛膏. [Variety]: 夾順毛避免上膏後結塊. (21) [Slogan]: STEP 16 臥蠶筆. [Variety]: 放大眼睛更有神. (22) [Slogan]: STEP 17 粉底. [Variety]: 加強有瑕疵的地方即可. (23) [Slogan]: STEP 18 腮紅. [Variety]: 修飾臉型提升氣色. (24) [Slogan]: STEP 19 修容. [Variety]: 深色打陰影區域，淺色提亮打亮高光. (25) [Slogan]: STEP 20 蜜粉. [Variety]: 吸附油脂柔焦毛孔. (26) [Slogan]: STEP 21 口紅. (27) [Slogan]: STEP 22 定妝. [Variety]: 增加妝容服貼度提升持久度.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator demonstrating a makeup routine.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair. She wears a black tank top with colorful polka dots at the bottom during the tutorial. In the ending montage, she appears in various outfits including a polka-dot shirt, a casual grey shirt, and a school-uniform style blazer and skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is a clean, modern indoor room with white wardrobes and a minimalist desk setup featuring a large illuminated mirror and various cosmetic products. The final montage shows a car interior with a white lace seat cover and an outdoor street with a red brick wall and posters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-arousal female voice speaking in Mandarin, set against a bright, upbeat acoustic guitar and electronic beat BGM. The voice is clear and expressive, introducing the video's theme. (2) As the tutorial begins, the voice transitions to a professional narrative tone with a steady speech rate. Every change in the 'Step' graphic is accompanied by a subtle 'ding' or 'pop' post-production SFX. (3) Throughout the makeup application, the interplay remains consistent: the speaker provides tips and instructions while the rhythmic BGM maintains a cheerful atmosphere. Occasional quiet 'clicks' of makeup products are audible but faint. (4) Towards the end, as the final setting spray is applied, there is a short 'whoosh' SFX. The montage at the very end features a swell in the music's volume, ending on a positive, high-energy note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-Step Instruction -> Result Montage
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an educational and entertaining beauty tutorial, meticulously documenting a 22-step professional makeup routine to demonstrate the contrast between a quick 5-minute look and a more dedicated, high-quality makeup process.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Various makeup products and brands are clearly visible and used throughout the tutorial, which functions as an implicit recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly detailed, well-produced makeup tutorial with clear instructional graphics and an energetic vibe, suitable for beauty-focused social media clusters.
